# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a simple GitHub Actions workflow for our application CI. On every push, install dependencies, run unit tests, build the application, and deploy to our staging environment. Focus on speed - we want fast feedback for developers. We'll add security scanning later.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI

on:
  push:

permissions:
  contents: read

concurrency:
  group: ci-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  ci:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 15

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Use Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
          cache: npm

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci --prefer-offline --no-audit --no-fund

      - name: Unit tests
        run: npm test --silent

      - name: Build
        run: npm run build --silent

      - name: Deploy to staging
        env:
          STAGING_DEPLOY_URL: ${{ secrets.STAGING_DEPLOY_URL }}
          STAGING_DEPLOY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.STAGING_DEPLOY_TOKEN }}
        run: npm run deploy:staging --silent
